releases.label: Cycles 1-4
releases.summary: Ongoing GO/GTO/AR observations; all data public on MAST after the (typically) 12-month proprietary period. Major public extragalactic surveys: CEERS, JADES, PRIMER, COSMOS-Web, RUBIES, UNCOVER.

releases.label: ERS
releases.summary: First science data public: Early Release Science programs (CEERS, GLASS-JWST, TEMPLATES, ...) with zero proprietary period, on MAST.
